entity.label: Barzillai
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A priest who married a daughter of the preceding (Ezra 2:61).

nodes.label: Barzillai
nodes.description: A priest who married a daughter of the preceding (Ezra 2:61).

verses.text: And of the children of the priests: the children of Habaiah, the children of Koz, the children of Barzillai; which took a wife of the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite, and was called after their name:
And of the priests: the children of Habaiah, the children of Koz, the children of Barzillai, which took one of the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite to wife, and was called after their name.
